a.t-attf-class: hrmis-nav__item #{'is-active' if (active_menu == 'manage_requests' and ('/hrmis/manage/history/' not in request.httprequest.path) and (request.params.get('tab') in (None,'','leave','history'))) else ''}

hrmis-nav__item #{'is-active' if (active_menu == 'manage_requests' and ((request.params.get('tab') in ('transfer_requests','transfer_status','transfer_vacancies')) or ('/hrmis/manage/history/' in request.httprequest.path))) else ''}

t.div: No leave requests pending your action.

div.t-att-data-search: '%s %s %s %s' % ( lv.employee_id.name or '', lv.holiday_status_id.name or '', lv.request_date_from or '', lv.request_date_to or '' )

a.style: text-decoration:none; color: #000; cursor: pointer; text-wrap: wrap;
text-decoration:none; color: #000; cursor: pointer; text-wrap: wrap;

t.t-esc: (('district_id' in lv.employee_id._fields and lv.employee_id.district_id and lv.employee_id.district_id.name) or ('hrmis_district_id' in lv.employee_id._fields and lv.employee_id.hrmis_district_id and lv.employee_id.hrmis_district_id.name) or 'District name')

div.style: display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap:8px; text-wrap: wrap;

t.t-value: (('private_name' in lv._fields and lv.private_name) or lv.name or '')

t.t-esc: (lv.name or '') if (rmk and not rmk_stripped) and (lv.name and lv.name.replace('*','').strip()) else rmk

t.t-value: (lv.hrmis_supporting_attachment_ids if 'hrmis_supporting_attachment_ids' in lv._fields else (attachments_by_leave_id.get(lv.id) if attachments_by_leave_id else False))

div.style: padding:4px 0; max-height:160px; overflow-y:auto; border:1px solid #eee; border-radius:8px; padding:8px;

t.div: No transfer requests pending your action.

tr.t-att-data-date: (str(tr.submitted_on or tr.create_date)[:10] if (tr.submitted_on or tr.create_date) else '')
tr.t-att-data-search: '%s %s %s %s %s' % ( tr.employee_id.name or '', tr.name or '', (tr.required_facility_id.name if tr.required_facility_id else ''), (tr.required_district_id.name if tr.required_district_id else ''), (tr.employee_id.hrmis_designation.name if (tr.employee_id and tr.employee_id.hrmis_designation) else '') )

div.div: No vacant posts available for this transfer.

div.t-att-data-date: (str(tr.submitted_on or tr.create_date)[:10] if (tr.submitted_on or tr.create_date) else '')
div.t-att-data-search: '%s %s %s %s %s' % ( tr.employee_id.name or '', tr.name or '', (tr.required_facility_id.name if tr.required_facility_id else ''), (tr.required_district_id.name if tr.required_district_id else ''), (tr.employee_id.hrmis_designation.name if (tr.employee_id and tr.employee_id.hrmis_designation) else '') )
'%s %s %s %s' % ( lv.employee_id.name or '', lv.holiday_status_id.name or '', lv.request_date_from or '', lv.request_date_to or '' )

t.t-esc: (('district_id' in lv.employee_id._fields and lv.employee_id.district_id and lv.employee_id.district_id.name) or ('hrmis_district_id' in lv.employee_id._fields and lv.employee_id.hrmis_district_id and lv.employee_id.hrmis_district_id.name) or 'District name')

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary w-100 js-tv-acc-reset tv-btn-sameheight

div.class: w-100 d-flex flex-wrap align-items-center justify-content-between gap-2

table.class: table table-sm table-bordered table-hover align-middle mb-0

t.div: No leave history found for this employee.

div.t-att-data-search: '%s %s %s %s' % ( lv.employee_id.name or '', lv.holiday_status_id.name or '', lv.request_date_from or '', lv.request_date_to or '' )

t.t-esc: ((('gender' in employee._fields and employee.gender) or ('hrmis_gender' in employee._fields and employee.hrmis_gender) or '') or '').replace('_',' ').title()

(('facility_id' in employee._fields and employee.facility_id and employee.facility_id.name) or ('hrmis_facility_id' in employee._fields and employee.hrmis_facility_id and employee.hrmis_facility_id.name) or '')

(('district_id' in employee._fields and employee.district_id and employee.district_id.name) or ('hrmis_district_id' in employee._fields and employee.hrmis_district_id and employee.hrmis_district_id.name) or '')
('hrmis_joining_date' in employee._fields and employee.hrmis_joining_date) or ('first_contract_date' in employee._fields and employee.first_contract_date) or ''
employee.mobile_phone or (('hrmis_contact_info' in employee._fields and employee.hrmis_contact_info) or '')

t.div: No transfer requests history available for this employee.

t.t-esc: (str(tr.submitted_on or tr.create_date)[:19] if (tr.submitted_on or tr.create_date) else '')

t.div: No disciplinary actions history available yet.
